name: github-openclaw
description: GitHub operations via `gh` CLI: issues, PRs, CI runs, code review, API queries.
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 github 相關工作
幫我啟用 github 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 github

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the github skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
